mapper.select: SELECT id, note_id, tag_id, parsed_tag_name, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_tag_mapping WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, note_id, tag_id, parsed_tag_name, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_tag_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT tag_id FROM biz_note_tag_mapping WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND tag_id IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_note_tag_mapping (note_id, tag_id, parsed_tag_name, status, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{mapping.noteId}, #{mapping.tagId}, #{mapping.parsedTagName}, #{mapping.status}, 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_deleted = 0, tag_id = VALUES(tag_id), status = VALUES(status)
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET tag_id = #{tagId}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET tag_id = NULL, status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE note_id IN
#{noteId}

UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE tag_id IN
#{tagId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_note_tag_mapping WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND tag_id IS NULL AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT m.note_id AS sourceNoteId, n.title AS sourceNoteTitle, m.parsed_tag_name AS parsedTagName,
CASE WHEN n.user_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isCrossUser,
0 AS isCrossUser,
n.status AS sourceNoteStatus, m.create_time AS createTime FROM biz_note_tag_mapping m INNER JOIN biz_note n ON n.id = m.note_id WHERE m.tag_id = #{tagId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND n.status != 8
AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR n.status = 6)
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT t.tag_name FROM biz_note_tag_mapping m INNER JOIN biz_tag t ON t.id = m.tag_id INNER JOIN biz_note n ON n.id = m.note_id WHERE m.note_id = #{noteId} AND m.tag_id IS NOT NULL AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 2 AND n.status = 6 ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
